# deptry package name mapping
# ============================
# Maps PyPI install names to their actual Python import module names.
# Required when the two differ, to avoid false-positive "unused dependency" warnings.
#
# Format (one entry per line):
#   pypi-package-name=python_import_name
#
# Lines starting with # are comments and are ignored.
# To add a new mapping, just append a line at the bottom of the relevant section.
#
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION: ignore (runtime-implicit packages, never imported directly)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Format: ignore=pypi-package-name
#
# Packages loaded as plugins/transports at runtime without a direct import.
ignore=stix-shifter-modules-splunk    # loaded by stix-shifter-utils as a runtime plugin
ignore=email_validator                # required by pydantic for EmailStr; never imported directly
ignore=google-auth-oauthlib           # optional HTTP transport for google-auth; alters behaviour without import
ignore=google-auth-httplib2           # optional HTTP transport for google-auth; alters behaviour without import

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION: map (PyPI name -> Python import module name)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

# Well-known stdlib-adjacent mismatches
beautifulsoup4=bs4
GitPython=git
PyGithub=github
PyYAML=yaml
python-dateutil=dateutil
python-docx=docx
pydantic-settings=pydantic_settings
typing-extensions=typing_extensions
vt-py=vt

# STIX / TAXII ecosystem
stix2-elevator=stix2elevator
stix2-validator=stix2validator
stix2-patterns=stix2patterns
taxii2-client=taxii2client
stix-shifter-utils=stix_shifter

# Vendor SDKs
anyrun-sdk=anyrun
crowdstrike-falconpy=falconpy
datalake-scripts=datalake
domaintools-api=domaintools
edgegrid-python=akamai
feedly-client=feedly
matrix-nio=nio
msgraph-sdk=msgraph
OTXv2=OTXv2
pySigma=sigma
sixgill-clients=cybersixgill
valhallaAPI=valhallaAPI
vmray-rest-api=vmray
yara-python=yara

# Google namespace packages (google.auth / google.oauth2 ship in google-auth)
google-auth=google
google-api-python-client=googleapiclient

# Azure namespace packages
azure-identity=azure

# Other
pdfminer.six=pdfminer
pyjwt=jwt
python-dotenv=dotenv
